landing.subtitle: An apex agricultural intellect forged for Kerala. AI-powered disease detection, crop recommendations, weather intelligence, and smart farming — all in one platform.
landing.modules_list: Disease Scanner · Crop Advisor · Weather Intel · Fertilizer · AI Chat · Dashboard
landing.orchestrated_sub: A seamless pipeline from field data to actionable intelligence, powered by real AI models.
landing.step1_desc: Upload crop images, enter soil data, or ask questions. Our system accepts any agricultural input.
landing.step2_desc: AI models analyze your data against Kerala-specific databases, weather forecasts, and crop science.
landing.step3_desc: Receive actionable recommendations: disease treatments, crop suggestions, fertilizer schedules, alerts.
landing.tactical_desc: Six AI-powered modules. Fully operational. Click any to launch.
landing.smart_dashboard_desc: Command center with live weather, system status, and quick module access.
landing.footer_desc: Full-stack agricultural AI platform forged for Kerala. Disease detection, crop recommendations, weather intelligence.

dashboard.subtitle: All agricultural intelligence systems online.

chat.title: Farm Intel Assistant
chat.subtitle: Kerala agricultural intelligence · Ask anything about crops, diseases, soil, weather
chat.intro: Your dedicated farming AI specializing in Kerala agriculture. Ask about crops, diseases, soil, weather, or government schemes.
chat.placeholder: Ask about crops, diseases, soil, weather...
chat.offline: Backend offline — start the FastAPI server
chat.offline_msg:
⚠️ Backend server not running. Please start it with:

`cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload`
chat.sug1: My pepper vine leaves are wilting rapidly and there's black rot on the base. It smells slightly like alcohol.
chat.sug2: I'm growing Nendran bananas in laterite soil. What is the precise NPK dosing schedule for the first 5 months?
chat.sug3: My 15-year old coconut palms have yellowing leaves on the outer whorls, and nuts are falling early.
chat.sug4: I need an organic treatment protocol for Rice Leaf Folder before the panicle initiation stage.
